reasoning: OpenAI completed a major 18-month-long restructuring process on October 28, 2025. This transition converted its commercial arm into a Public Benefit Corporation (OpenAI Group PBC). However, key to this restructuring—and formalized in agreements with the Delaware and California Attorneys General—is that the nonprofit parent (now renamed the OpenAI Foundation) retains full control and oversight over the new for-profit PBC, including the sole power to appoint and remove all PBC board members. Because the nonprofit board remains in control of OpenAI's commercial operations, this restructuring does not trigger a 'Yes' resolution.
